name: @jsonbored/gittensory-raycast
description: Raycast extension scaffold for Gittensory — GitHub Device Flow via the Gittensory API.

scripts.test:ci: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test

title: Gittensory
description: Raycast miner command center for Gittensory — plan work, analyze branches, open PRs, and copy public-safe packets.
author: jsonbored

commands.name: login
commands.title: Login
commands.description: Authenticate with GitHub Device Flow through Gittensory

commands.name: plan-next-work
commands.title: Plan Next Work
commands.description: Rank next contributor-safe work from your decision pack

commands.name: analyze-branch
commands.title: Analyze Branch
commands.description: Metadata-only branch analysis for the configured repo path

commands.name: open-prs
commands.title: Open PRs
commands.description: Show open PR monitor and next-step guidance

commands.name: copy-pr-packet
commands.title: Copy PR Packet
commands.description: Copy a public-safe PR packet markdown to the clipboard

commands.name: explain-blockers
commands.title: Explain Blockers
commands.description: Explain scoreability blockers for login or current branch

preferences.name: repoPath
preferences.title: Repo Path
preferences.description: Local git repository path for branch analysis and PR packet commands

preferences.name: repoFullName
preferences.title: Repo (owner/name)
preferences.description: Optional override when git remote cannot be inferred

preferences.name: baseRef
preferences.title: Base Ref
preferences.description: Git base ref for local diff metadata (default: upstream or origin/main)
